impact.mission: To bridge the digital divide by bringing accessible AI education, free technology tools, and community-centered programs to underserved populations — ensuring that the benefits of artificial intelligence reach every corner of society, not just the privileged few.

values.name: Accessibility
values.description: Technology education and AI tools must be available regardless of income, location, or background. We remove every barrier we can.

values.name: Transparency
values.description: We publish our impact data, financials, and program outcomes publicly. Trust is earned through honesty.

values.name: Community First
values.description: Every program is designed with communities — not just for them. We listen, iterate, and measure real outcomes.

values.name: Open Source
values.description: All curricula, tools, and resources we create are freely licensed for any organization to use, adapt, and redistribute.

values.name: Dignity
values.description: Every participant deserves a learning experience that is respectful, culturally appropriate, and never condescending.

values.name: Long-Term Impact
values.description: We invest in sustainable change — mentorship relationships, community partnerships, and skills that last a lifetime.
